action: Use this synthesis package as the start-here for pressure-corner/same-QOI continuation.
why_now: It consolidates what was tried, what worked, what failed, and why before more sampling creates more artifacts.
acceptance_signal: No unsupported claim lacks a source path; no coefficient admission is changed.
stop_condition_guardrail: Documentation may explain blockers but cannot admit K/F6 or launch jobs.
board_row_to_claim: this row complete after finish_task passes

action: Claim TODO-PRESSURE-CORNER-LOW-RECIRC-ANCHOR-HARVEST and preflight candidate terminal/source paths before any sampler launch.
why_now: This is the only route that can test whether the lower-right topology has ordinary-flow component-K potential.
input_artifacts: pressure-corner publication freeze; same-QOI UQ table; matched-plane recirculation harvest; high-heat/no-recirculation candidate packages
exact_output_contract: candidate rows with p, p_rgh, U, rho/T, face area, normals, signed/absolute/positive/negative mass flux, RAF/RMF/SVF, source path, and time/window.
acceptance_signal: Ordinary component-K review is only queued if aggregate RAF < 0.01 and RMF < 0.01.
stop_condition_guardrail: If RAF/RMF fail, route to section-effective diagnostics; no F6/component-K admission.

action: For the three current corner residual rows, inventory whether neighboring retained windows and mesh-family outputs already exist.
why_now: It may unblock uncertainty status without launching new solvers if artifacts already exist.
exact_output_contract: per-case same-label/formula/sign window inventory and mesh/GCI availability table.
acceptance_signal: Rows either gain cited neighboring-window/GCI evidence or get a precise sampler/compute queue.
stop_condition_guardrail: Do not infer GCI from unlike labels, formulas, pressure basis, or topology.
board_row_to_claim: new narrow same-QOI time/mesh inventory row

action: Claim a raw F6 endpoint face sampler row for the six clean endpoint pairs and twenty face-matrix rows.
why_now: F6 is blocked at raw sampler output, and the preflight already names endpoints and source paths.
exact_output_contract: raw p/p_rgh/U/rho-or-T face summaries, retained/neighborhood windows, mesh-level labels, and no-fit gate status.
acceptance_signal: F6 rows move from preflight to raw evidence but remain diagnostic until time/GCI and ordinary-flow gates pass.
stop_condition_guardrail: No F6 fit, no endpoint-pressure invention, no hidden global multiplier.
board_row_to_claim: new TODO-F6-ENDPOINT-RAW-FACE-SAMPLER row or equivalent exact sampler row

action: After anchor/UQ/F6 evidence lands, run the comparison/admission review.
why_now: Review before new evidence would only restate diagnostic blockers.
input_artifacts: pressure-corner publication freeze; this synthesis; completed low-recirculation anchor; F6 raw sampler; same-QOI UQ updates
exact_output_contract: comparison matrix labeling each row component_K, cluster_K, section_effective, pressure_recovery, or diagnostic with reasons.
acceptance_signal: Every changed label has pressure basis, velocity basis, straight/developing correction, component isolation, recirculation, source envelope, and same-QOI UQ status.
stop_condition_guardrail: F6 remains separate and cannot consume component/cluster rows.

action: Write the paper-facing methods/results/limitations text after the comparison gate or from the frozen diagnostic result.
why_now: The current diagnostic finding is already publishable, but coefficient claims are not.
exact_output_contract: methods paragraph, result paragraph, limitations paragraph, table-ready claim ledger, and caption text.
acceptance_signal: Uses gross static pressure rise, hydrostatic dominated, signed available residual, and section-effective pressure diagnostic.
stop_condition_guardrail: Forbid negative loss, negative component K, corner produces pressure, and F6 fixes the corner.
